intent_summary: Integrate Field Monitor vendor tier into Talent Flow for LinkedIn public profile change detection. Bridge module at hubs/people-intelligence/imo/middle/movement_engine/linkedin_monitor.py reads from field_monitor.check_log vendor tier (current_title, current_company changes) and fires EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE into existing movement engine. Seeds 100 LinkedIn URLs from people.people_master into field_monitor.url_registry. Sample-gated to 100 records. Depends on field_monitor schema being deployed (wp-20260305-field-monitor-phase1-bootstrap-r2). No modifications to existing movement engine. DB writes: seed INSERTs to field_monitor.url_registry and field_monitor.field_state. Doc updates to pipeline.md and SCHEMA.md.

source_packet.note: Source packet arrived pre-structured with allowed_paths, flow_contract, payload, and db_targets. Full context passed through to Planner.

middle: linkedin_monitor.py — bridge reads vendor tier, fires EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE
egress: people.person_movement_history — written by existing movement engine
field_monitor.check_log — append-only, written by CF Workers

constraints: Do not modify existing movement engine (movement_engine.py, state_machine.py)
Depends on field_monitor schema being deployed first
